name: Scarlet Witch
text: Chaos Control — Interrupt: When boost icons on an encounter card would be counted, discard the top card of the encounter deck and count the number of boost icons on that card instead. (Limit once per phase.)
real_text: Chaos Control — Interrupt: When boost icons on an encounter card would be counted, discard the top card of the encounter deck and count the number of boost icons on that card instead. (Limit once per phase.)

linked_card.name: Wanda Maximoff
linked_card.text: Superpowered Siblings — Action: Discard 2 cards from your hand → draw 2 cards (draw 3 cards instead if Pietro Maximoff is in play). (Limit once per round.)
linked_card.real_text: Superpowered Siblings — Action: Discard 2 cards from your hand → draw 2 cards (draw 3 cards instead if Pietro Maximoff is in play). (Limit once per round.)

name: Quicksilver
text: Action: Ready Quicksilver. (Limit once per phase.)
real_text: Action: Ready Quicksilver. (Limit once per phase.)
flavor: "I've warned you never to threaten my sister!"

name: Chaos Magic
text: Hero Action: Play a card from your hand, ignoring its resource cost. Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck equal to that card's printed resource cost.
real_text: Hero Action: Play a card from your hand, ignoring its resource cost. Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck equal to that card's printed resource cost.
flavor: "I will shape the world as I see fit." —Scarlet Witch

name: Hex Bolt
text: Hero Action: Discard the top 3 cards of the encounter deck. For each card discarded this way that has boost icons equal to: - 0, deal 2 damage to an enemy. - 1, remove 2 threat from a scheme. - 2, draw 1 card. - 3+, place a status card on a character.
real_text: Hero Action: Discard the top 3 cards of the encounter deck. For each card discarded this way that has boost icons equal to: - 0, deal 2 damage to an enemy. - 1, remove 2 threat from a scheme. - 2, draw 1 card. - 3+, place a status card on a character.

name: Molecular Decay
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 5 damage to an enemy and discard the top 2 cards of the encounter deck. For each boost icon discarded this way, deal 1 additional damage to that enemy.
real_text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 5 damage to an enemy and discard the top 2 cards of the encounter deck. For each boost icon discarded this way, deal 1 additional damage to that enemy.
flavor: "There is no defense against the Scarlet Witch!"

name: Warp Reality
text: Hero Interrupt: When an encounter card is revealed from the encounter deck, cancel all of its effects and discard it. Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck equal to the number of boost icons on that card.
real_text: Hero Interrupt: When an encounter card is revealed from the encounter deck, cancel all of its effects and discard it. Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck equal to the number of boost icons on that card.

name: Agatha Harkness
text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Agatha Harkness → look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Add 1 of those to your hand and place the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
real_text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Agatha Harkness → look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Add 1 of those to your hand and place the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
flavor: "Don't let your anger get the best of you, Wanda."

name: Magic Shield
text: Hero Interrupt: When a friendly character would take any amount of damage, discard Magic Shield → prevent 3 of that damage.
real_text: Hero Interrupt: When a friendly character would take any amount of damage, discard Magic Shield → prevent 3 of that damage.

name: Scarlet Witch's Crest
text: Interrupt: When boost icons on an encounter card are counted, exhaust Scarlet Witch's Crest → increase or decrease the number of boost icons on that card by 1 for this count.
real_text: Interrupt: When boost icons on an encounter card are counted, exhaust Scarlet Witch's Crest → increase or decrease the number of boost icons on that card by 1 for this count.

name: Speed
text: Response: After Speed thwarts, ready him. (Limit once per round.)
real_text: Response: After Speed thwarts, ready him. (Limit once per round.)
flavor: "Hey! Geriatrics! Let's get a move on. The Avengers need us!"

name: Wiccan
text: Response: After Wiccan thwarts, discard the top card of the encounter deck. For each boost icon discarded this way, deal 1 damage to an enemy.
real_text: Response: After Wiccan thwarts, discard the top card of the encounter deck. For each boost icon discarded this way, deal 1 damage to an enemy.
flavor: "I'm the child of a witch and an android. I'm their wish come true."

name: Crisis Averted
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 6 threat from the main scheme. If you paid for this card using a [mental] resource, this thwart ignores the crisis icon ([crisis]).
real_text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 6 threat from the main scheme. If you paid for this card using a [mental] resource, this thwart ignores the crisis icon ([crisis]).

name: Multitasking
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 2 threat from a scheme. If you paid for this card using a [mental] resource, remove 2 threat from a different scheme.
real_text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 2 threat from a scheme. If you paid for this card using a [mental] resource, remove 2 threat from a different scheme.
flavor: "A hero isn't the one who always wins. They're the one who always tries." —Spider-Man

name: Swift Retribution
text: Hero Action (attack): The villain schemes. Deal 4 damage to the villain.
real_text: Hero Action (attack): The villain schemes. Deal 4 damage to the villain.
flavor: "Return what you've taken and I'll let you go. This time. But next time, you won't be so lucky. And I won't be so kind." —Moon Knight

name: Turn the Tide
text: Response (attack): After your hero thwarts and removes all threat from a scheme, deal 3 damage to an enemy.
real_text: Response (attack): After your hero thwarts and removes all threat from a scheme, deal 3 damage to an enemy.

name: The Power of Justice
text: Max 2 per deck. Double the number of resources this card generates while paying for a Justice (yellow) card.
real_text: Max 2 per deck. Double the number of resources this card generates while paying for a Justice (yellow) card.

name: Heroic Intuition
text:
Play under any player's control. Max 1 per player.
Your hero gets +1 THW.
real_text:
Play under any player's control. Max 1 per player.
Your hero gets +1 THW.

name: Order and Chaos
text: Team-Up (Quicksilver and Scarlet Witch). Max 1 per deck. Hero Interrupt: When a treachery card is revealed from the encounter deck, cancel its "When Revealed" effects, then deal 2 damage to the villain.
real_text: Team-Up (Quicksilver and Scarlet Witch). Max 1 per deck. Hero Interrupt: When a treachery card is revealed from the encounter deck, cancel its "When Revealed" effects, then deal 2 damage to the villain.

name: Spiritual Meditation
text: Play only if your identity has the [[Mystic]] trait. Action: Draw 2 cards. Choose and discard 1 card from your hand.
real_text: Play only if your identity has the [[Mystic]] trait. Action: Draw 2 cards. Choose and discard 1 card from your hand.
flavor: "Every spell, every sigil, every manipulation... you must keep a close eye on everything so it doesn't backfire."
illustrator: Morry Hollowell, Steve McNiven, & Dexter Vines

name: Energy
text: Max 1 per deck.
real_text: Max 1 per deck.

name: Genius
text: Max 1 per deck.
real_text: Max 1 per deck.

name: Strength
text: Max 1 per deck.
real_text: Max 1 per deck.

name: Slipping Sanity
text: Give to the Wanda Maximoff player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust Wanda Maximoff → remove Slipping Sanity from the game. • Discard the top 5 cards of the encounter deck. For each star icon([star]) in the boost area discarded this way, place 1 threat on the main scheme. Discard this obligation.
real_text: Give to the Wanda Maximoff player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust Wanda Maximoff → remove Slipping Sanity from the game. • Discard the top 5 cards of the encounter deck. For each star icon([star]) in the boost area discarded this way, place 1 threat on the main scheme. Discard this obligation.

name: The Next Evolution
text: Increase the number of boost icons on each encounter card by 1.
real_text: Increase the number of boost icons on each encounter card by 1.
flavor: "The High Evolutionary intends to build a god fit for the twenty-first century!" —High Evolutionary

name: Luminous
text: Forced Response: After Luminous activates against you, discard the top card of the encounter deck. If 2 or more boost icons were discarded this way, deal yourself 1 encounter card. (Scarlet Witch's nemesis minion.)
real_text: Forced Response: After Luminous activates against you, discard the top card of the encounter deck. If 2 or more boost icons were discarded this way, deal yourself 1 encounter card. (Scarlet Witch's nemesis minion.)

name: Magical Suspension
text: Attach to your identity. . Each card you play costs 1 additional resource. Hero Action: Exhaust your hero → discard this card.
real_text: Attach to your identity. . Each card you play costs 1 additional resource. Hero Action: Exhaust your hero → discard this card.

name: Chaos Manipulation
text: When Revealed: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for Luminous and put her into play engaged with you. Discard the top card of the encounter deck. If 2 or more boost icons were discarded this way, Luminous activates against you.
real_text: When Revealed: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for Luminous and put her into play engaged with you. Discard the top card of the encounter deck. If 2 or more boost icons were discarded this way, Luminous activates against you.

name: Browbeat
text: Play only if your identity has the [[Avenger]] trait. Hero Action (attack): Deal 2 damage to the villain. Deal X additional damage to the villain (to a maximum of 3), where X is equal to the villain's stage number.
real_text: Play only if your identity has the [[Avenger]] trait. Hero Action (attack): Deal 2 damage to the villain. Deal X additional damage to the villain (to a maximum of 3), where X is equal to the villain's stage number.

name: Last Stand
text: Hero Interrupt: When an ally you control attacks, it gets +3 ATK for that attack. After that attack resolves, discard that ally.
real_text: Hero Interrupt: When an ally you control attacks, it gets +3 ATK for that attack. After that attack resolves, discard that ally.
flavor: "Heed, great fiend! Thou shalt not defeat me easily!" —Lady Sif

name: Bait and Switch
text: Hero Action (thwart): The villain attacks you. Remove 4 threat from the main scheme.
real_text: Hero Action (thwart): The villain attacks you. Remove 4 threat from the main scheme.
flavor: "You didn't really think I'd let you get away with that, did you?" —Spider-Man

name: Recuperation
text: Alter-Ego Action: Heal damage from your alter-ego equal to your REC.
real_text: Alter-Ego Action: Heal damage from your alter-ego equal to your REC.
flavor: "You look to be feeling better." —Stephen Strange
illustrator: Neil Edwards, Terry Pallot, & Chris Sotomayor
